sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ رَجُلٌ عَجُوزٌ مُحَمَّدًا عَنِ اسْمِ الْفُنْدُقِ.
sentences.translation: Stariji čovjek je pitao Muhammeda ime hotela.
sentences.translationEn: An old man asked Muhammad for the name of the hotel.

sentences.translation: Muhammed mu je rekao i dao mu adresu.
sentences.translationEn: Muhammad told him and gave him the address.

sentences.translation: Stariji čovjek mu je zahvalio i polako otišao.
sentences.translationEn: The old man thanked him and walked slowly.

sentences.translation: Muhammed je pogledao za njim i nasmiješio se.
sentences.translationEn: Muhammad looked after him and smiled.
